title: Finance Executive – General Ledger (Grants) - Redhill
description:
• Supervise and lead a team of staff in the section in handling day-to-day grant-related financial matters, month-end and year-end accounts closing, including the preparation and/or review of the monthly, quarterly and year-end audit schedules
  • Responsible for the good quality of the grant-related balance sheet accounts
  • Review grant documents and apply the appropriate accounting treatment for grant project accounts
  • Review grant variation documents and update relevant project account details
  • Ensure accurate and timely submission of claims and prompt disbursements
  • Ensure no outstanding items in project accounts and deactivate project account promptly upon expiry
  • Review grant-related billings and statement of accounts
  • Review incoming grant funds and resolve unreconciled sums
  • Ensure no outstanding items in project accounts and deactivate project account promptly upon expiry
  • Investigate and resolve user queries
  • Responsible for grant-related GST, corporate tax and other statistical submissions
  • Liaise with internal and external auditors on grant-related audit matters
  • Lead and participate in process improvement projects
  • Ad-hoc assignments

Requirements

  • At least a Degree in Accountancy or ACCA equivalent
  • At least 3 years of relevant working experience, with 1-year experience in a supervisory position
  • Higher qualified/experienced candidates will be considered for the Senior Finance Executive/Senior Accountant position
  • IT savvy - proficient in Microsoft Office such as MS Word, Excel and Powerpoint
  • Hands-on experience with SAP system will be an advantage
  • Prior audit experience will be an advantage
  • Strong interpersonal, communication and analytical skills
  • Able to take pressure and work within tight deadlines
  • Meticulous, motivated, committed, resourceful and able to work independently

For interested candidate, please email your resumes to denyse.tan@recruitexpress.com.sg

Denyse Nicole Tan Shuqin (#HDT)

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

CEI No: R1333503

Company EA license : 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
